title: podman exec available?
body:
can we use this python client to execute commands on a container? 

I see this [method](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/blob/main/podman/domain/containers.py#L125) but don't know how to invoke it.

comments.body: @statiksof https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/126 is the PR implementing this feature.
This has been fixed by https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/126, closing.
